meta-description: Learn about durable medical equipment by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Durable medical equipment (DME)
excerpt: Equipment and supplies ordered by a health care provider for everyday or extended use. Coverage for DME may include: oxygen equipment, wheelchairs, crutches or blood testing strips for diabetics.
content:
Equipment and supplies ordered by a health care provider for everyday or extended use. Coverage for DME may include: oxygen equipment, wheelchairs, crutches or blood testing strips for diabetics.

Preview plans and prices based on your income. Check out a plan's Summary of Benefits to get a quick idea of what DME supplies are covered, if any. You can find a link to the Summary of Benefits by clicking "Details" for a plan.
